description: Seeded bug catalog for Experiments A and B. Bugs are designed to pass the existing test suite but be logically wrong on untested paths.

bugs.description: Off-by-one in commit log traversal: skip the first commit when walking the chain
bugs.injection_site: log command — commit chain traversal loop
bugs.test_passing_reason: Test only checks log output format with 2+ commits; the off-by-one manifests only with exactly 1 commit in specific traversal paths

bugs.description: Off-by-one in diff line numbering: line numbers start at 0 instead of 1
bugs.test_passing_reason: Diff tests check content but not line number accuracy in all edge cases

bugs.description: Empty file handling: hash function returns wrong value for zero-length content
bugs.test_passing_reason: No test adds an empty file

bugs.description: Missing directory creation: add command fails when file is in a subdirectory that doesn't exist in objects/
bugs.injection_site: add command — object storage path creation
bugs.test_passing_reason: Tests only add files in the root directory

bugs.description: Reversed sort in status output: modified files listed before new files
bugs.test_passing_reason: Status tests check presence of entries but not strict ordering between categories

bugs.description: Incorrect byte masking in MiniHash: use 0xFF mask before XOR instead of after, producing different results for bytes > 127
bugs.test_passing_reason: Test inputs use only ASCII characters (all bytes < 128)

bugs.description: Wrong index when reading staged files: use last entry instead of matching entry when multiple files are staged
bugs.test_passing_reason: Most tests stage only one file before committing

bugs.description: Missing trailing newline in show command output for binary-like content
bugs.test_passing_reason: Show tests use text content and check with string contains

bugs.description: Incomplete index cleanup after reset: index file retains entries for reset files
bugs.test_passing_reason: Reset tests check file system state but not index file contents after reset

bugs.description: Checkout with uncommitted changes: silently overwrites working directory without checking for modifications
bugs.test_passing_reason: Checkout tests commit before switching; no test checks the uncommitted-changes guard
